seo.metaTitle: Google Cloud Hosting India — Managed GCP Partner | ICSDC
seo.metaDescription: ICSDC is a certified Google Cloud partner in India. Fully managed GCP setup, migration, security, and 24/7 support. Enterprise Google Cloud from ₹4,999/month.

api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.heroTitle: Managed Google Cloud Hosting — Global Infrastructure, Local Expertise
api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.heroSubtitle: Certified Google Cloud Partner in India
api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.heroDescription: Unlock the full power of Google Cloud Platform with ICSDC as your managed GCP partner. We handle architecture, migration, security, monitoring, and optimisation — so you get Google's global infrastructure without the complexity.

pillars.title: Global Infrastructure
pillars.desc: Google's network spans 200+ countries with 35 regions — serve users worldwide with ultra-low latency.

pillars.title: Fully Managed by ICSDC
pillars.desc: Our certified GCP engineers manage your entire cloud environment — setup, security, and ongoing operations.

pillars.title: Infinite Scalability
pillars.desc: Google Cloud scales from startup to enterprise instantly — handle any workload without infrastructure limits.

pillars.title: Google-Grade Security
pillars.desc: Built-in DDoS protection, Cloud Armor, IAM, and encryption — the same security Google uses internally.

api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.plansTitle: Managed Google Cloud Plans — Powered by GCP, Managed by ICSDC
api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.plansSubtitle: All plans include GCP account setup, architecture design, migration, security, monitoring, and 24/7 support.

plans.tagline: Managed Google Cloud for startups and small teams
Full-featured managed GCP for growing businesses
Custom enterprise GCP architecture for large organisations

api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.whyGoogleSubtitle: Google Cloud is the same infrastructure that powers Google Search, YouTube, and Gmail — now available for your business.

whyGoogleCards.title: World's Fastest Network
whyGoogleCards.desc: Google's private fibre network spans the globe — data travels faster than the public internet.

whyGoogleCards.title: Live Migration
whyGoogleCards.desc: VMs migrate without downtime during maintenance — 99.99% availability SLA across all regions.

whyGoogleCards.title: Security by Design
whyGoogleCards.desc: Zero-trust architecture, Cloud Armor DDoS protection, and end-to-end encryption built in.

whyGoogleCards.title: BigData & Analytics
whyGoogleCards.desc: BigQuery processes petabytes of data in seconds — built-in AI/ML with Vertex AI and TensorFlow.

whyGoogleCards.title: True Auto-Scaling
whyGoogleCards.desc: Compute scales to zero when idle and back to full capacity in seconds — pay only for what you use.

whyGoogleCards.title: Committed Use Discounts
whyGoogleCards.desc: Save up to 57% on compute costs with committed use contracts — ICSDC manages this for you.

api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.servicesTitle: Google Cloud Services We Manage for You
api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.servicesSubtitle: ICSDC's certified GCP engineers are experts across the full Google Cloud portfolio.

servicesCards.title: Compute Engine
servicesCards.desc: Virtual machines with custom vCPU/RAM, preemptible instances, and live migration for maximum uptime.

servicesCards.title: Cloud Storage
servicesCards.desc: Object storage with multi-region replication, lifecycle policies, and CDN integration.

servicesCards.title: Cloud SQL & Spanner
servicesCards.desc: Managed relational databases — MySQL, PostgreSQL, and globally distributed Spanner.

servicesCards.title: Google Kubernetes Engine
servicesCards.desc: Managed Kubernetes for containerised workloads — autopilot mode available for zero-ops deployments.

servicesCards.title: Cloud CDN & Load Balancing
servicesCards.desc: Google's global CDN and HTTP(S) load balancer — serve content from the nearest edge node worldwide.

servicesCards.title: Cloud Armor & Security
servicesCards.desc: DDoS mitigation, WAF rules, IAM policies, and VPC Service Controls managed by our security team.

api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.useCasesTitle: What Will You Build on Google Cloud?
api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.useCasesSubtitle: Google Cloud powers the world's most demanding applications — from startups to Fortune 500 enterprises.

useCases.title: Web & Mobile Apps
useCases.desc: Scalable backend infrastructure with Firebase, App Engine, and Cloud Run for modern applications.

useCases.title: Data & Analytics
useCases.desc: BigQuery, Dataflow, and Looker for real-time analytics on petabyte-scale datasets.

useCases.title: AI & Machine Learning
useCases.desc: Vertex AI, AutoML, and TPUs for training and serving ML models at any scale.

useCases.title: Enterprise SaaS
useCases.desc: Multi-tenant SaaS platforms with managed GKE, Cloud SQL, and global load balancing.

api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.migrationTitle: Migrate to Google Cloud in 4 Steps
api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.migrationSubtitle: ICSDC handles your entire GCP migration — from initial assessment to go-live — with zero downtime.

migrationSteps.title: Assessment & Discovery
migrationSteps.description: We audit your current infrastructure, dependencies, and workloads to create a detailed GCP migration plan.

migrationSteps.title: Architecture & Planning
migrationSteps.description: Our GCP architects design the optimal cloud architecture — compute, storage, networking, and security.

migrationSteps.title: Migration & Testing
migrationSteps.description: We migrate your data and applications to GCP with parallel running to ensure zero-downtime cutover.

migrationSteps.title: Optimisation & Ongoing Management
migrationSteps.description: Post-migration, we optimise costs, monitor performance, and manage your GCP environment 24/7.

ctaBand1.title: Ready to Move Your Business to Google Cloud?
ctaBand1.description: Free GCP assessment, architecture design, and migration included with every plan.

api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.testimonialTitle: What Our Google Cloud Clients Say
api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.faqTitle: FAQs About ICSDC Managed Google Cloud
api::google-cloud-hosting-page.google-cl.faqContactDesc:
Our certified Google Cloud engineers are available 24/7 for consultations, architecture reviews, and migrations.

📞 +91 98109 58857

faq.question: Is ICSDC an official Google Cloud partner?
faq.answer: Yes. ICSDC is a certified Google Cloud Partner with engineers holding active GCP certifications including Professional Cloud Architect, Professional Data Engineer, and Professional DevOps Engineer.

faq.question: Can you migrate our existing on-premises or cloud infrastructure to GCP?
faq.answer: Yes. We perform end-to-end migrations from on-premises servers, AWS, Azure, or other cloud providers to Google Cloud — with zero downtime using Google's Migrate for Compute Engine tooling.

faq.question: How does GCP pricing work and will my bills be unpredictable?
faq.answer: GCP uses pay-as-you-go pricing, but ICSDC implements committed use discounts and sustained use savings to keep costs predictable. We provide monthly cost reports and alerts to prevent billing surprises.

faq.question: What GCP regions are available for India?
faq.answer: GCP has a Mumbai region (asia-south1) and Delhi region (asia-south2) for low-latency hosting in India. We also leverage Singapore and other Asia-Pacific regions for regional redundancy.

faq.question: What is included in the management service?
faq.answer: ICSDC managed GCP includes: architecture design, initial setup, IAM & security configuration, monitoring & alerting, cost optimisation, OS & software patching for your VMs, backup management, and 24/7 support from certified GCP engineers.

ctaBand2.title: Experience Google Cloud with ICSDC as Your Partner
ctaBand2.description: Certified GCP management from ₹4,999/month. Free assessment and migration included.

testimonials.name: Arjun Mehta
testimonials.quote: ICSDC migrated our entire data pipeline to Google Cloud in 2 weeks with zero downtime. BigQuery performance is 50x faster than our old on-prem setup. Exceptional GCP expertise.

testimonials.name: Sunita Krishnan
testimonials.quote: Running our HIPAA-compliant healthcare platform on GCP managed by ICSDC. The security configuration, Cloud Armor setup, and compliance documentation were handled perfectly.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Nambiar
testimonials.quote: Our student platform handles 100,000 concurrent users during exam season thanks to GKE auto-scaling managed by ICSDC. We've never had a capacity issue since the migration.
